scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck:vercel: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server exec tsc --noEmit --target es2022 --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --types node --skipLibCheck ../../api/index.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "@workspace/api-server" --filter "@workspace/climate-change" --filter "@workspace/mockup-sandbox" --filter "@workspace/scripts" --if-present run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:vercel
